claim_boundary: Fast differentiable QA optimization proxy. The plotted bootstrap current is a normalized optimizer-steering proxy, not a high-fidelity SFINCS kinetic current. Promote accepted candidates with completed sfincs_jax scan-er outputs before publication claims.

required_gates: write the accepted QA-plus-bootstrap candidate as a VMEC equilibrium
run sfincs_jax scan-er at selected radii and electric-field values
check residual convergence and CPU/GPU agreement
compare FSABjHatOverRootFSAB2 and fluxes against SFINCS Fortran v3 when in shared scope
run radial and velocity-space convergence before using the current profile in a paper
